listings.title: Api Tester
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to test an API, validate endpoints, check response schemas, run API test suites, or do load testing.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Code Review
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to review code, audit a pull request, check code quality, find bugs, or get feedback on implementation.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Container Manager
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to manage Docker containers, build images, inspect logs, handle Docker Compose, or work with container orchestration.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Database Migrator
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to run database migrations, manage schema changes, use alembic, upgrade or downgrade a database schema, or track schema versions.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Doc Generator
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to generate documentation, write docstrings, create API docs, build a README, or produce HTML/PDF documentation from code.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Git Workflow
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to automate git operations, manage branches, generate commit messages, handle PRs, set up git hooks, or implement a git workflow.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Pdf Reader
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to read, parse, or extract data from PDF files — text, tables, images, or metadata.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Performance Profiler
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to profile code performance, find bottlenecks, measure execution time, analyze memory usage, or optimize slow functions.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Secret Scanner
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to scan code for secrets, find leaked credentials, check for hardcoded API keys, audit git history for sensitive data, or set up secret detection.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Test Runner
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to run tests, check test coverage, set up a test suite, parse test results, or integrate testing into CI/CD.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Web Monitor
listings.description: Use this skill when the user wants to watch a webpage for changes, monitor a URL, detect content updates, or get notified when a site changes.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Analyst
listings.description: Data analyst that turns raw numbers into clear decisions. SQL, Python, dashboards, and plain-English insights.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Api Designer
listings.description: API design specialist for REST, GraphQL, and gRPC — clean contracts, clear versioning, and APIs developers love.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Architect
listings.description: System design expert that produces battle-tested architectures, ADRs, and migration paths for complex engineering problems.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Backend
listings.description: Senior backend engineer for APIs, databases, async systems, and production-grade Python/Node/Go services.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Data Engineer
listings.description: Data pipeline engineer for ETL/ELT, streaming, warehouses, and the infrastructure that keeps data flowing reliably.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Debugger
listings.description: Systematic bug hunter that traces errors to root causes and produces verified fixes, not guesses.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Devops
listings.description: DevOps engineer for CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and keeping production healthy.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Frontend
listings.description: Frontend engineer for React, TypeScript, accessible UIs, and polished user experiences that actually ship.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Gamedev
listings.description: Game developer for Unity, Godot, and web games — from game feel to performance to shipping.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Guard
listings.description: Security sentinel that audits code, infrastructure, and configurations for vulnerabilities and compliance gaps.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Legal
listings.description: Legal assistant for privacy policies, terms of service, compliance checklists, and contract language — always recommends a lawyer for final review.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Mobile
listings.description: Mobile engineer for React Native and Flutter apps — performant, native-feeling, and ready for both stores.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Pm
listings.description: Product manager that translates user needs into clear requirements, prioritized backlogs, and executable specs.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Sales
listings.description: Sales assistant that drafts outreach, qualifies leads, prepares proposals, and helps close deals without being pushy.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Scout
listings.description: Research hunter that tracks down information across the web, verifies sources, and delivers structured intel reports.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Security
listings.description: Application security engineer for secure-by-design implementation, threat modeling, and code-level security fixes.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Support
listings.description: Customer support agent that resolves issues with empathy, precision, and a bias toward the customer actually being helped.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Tutor
listings.description: Patient technical tutor that meets learners where they are and builds genuine understanding, not just working code.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Prowlr Writer
listings.description: Technical writer for documentation, READMEs, API references, tutorials, and developer content that people actually read.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Content Publish
listings.description: Content publishing pipeline — draft review, SEO check, image processing, cross-post to multiple channels, and analytics setup.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Daily Standup
listings.description: Automated daily standup — collects git activity, JIRA updates, and blockers, posts a structured summary to Slack.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Deploy Review
listings.description: Pre-deploy checklist — runs security scan, smoke tests, migration check, and produces a go/no-go recommendation before production deploys.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Incident Response
listings.description: Structured incident response workflow — detect, triage, communicate, resolve, post-mortem.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Onboarding
listings.description: New employee/contributor onboarding — environment setup validation, access provisioning checklist, and first-week orientation.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Pr Review Pipeline
listings.description: Automated pull request review pipeline — security scan, code quality check, and test coverage report before merge.
listings.author: ProwlrBot

listings.title: Computer Use
listings.description: Give Claude control of a computer — click, type, browse, run commands. Adapted from the Anthropic computer-use-demo quickstart.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Customer Support Agent
listings.description: Multi-turn customer support agent with tool use, knowledge base lookup, and escalation logic. From Anthropic Cookbook.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: PDF Analysis
listings.description: Analyze PDFs directly with Claude's native PDF support — extract text, summarize, answer questions, and compare documents.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: RAG Pipeline
listings.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline with vector search. Chunk, embed, store, and query your documents with Claude.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Structured Outputs
listings.description: Force Claude to return valid JSON matching a schema using tool use or prefilling. Works for data extraction, classification, and form filling.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Tool Use Orchestration
listings.description: Patterns for multi-tool orchestration, parallel tool execution, and agentic loops with Claude's tool use API.
listings.author: Anthropic

listings.title: Code Review Bot
listings.description: Automated code review that posts line-level GitHub PR comments with security findings, style issues, and improvement suggestions. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: GitHub Issue Triage
listings.description: Automatically triage incoming GitHub issues — classify by type, assign labels, route to teams, and draft responses. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Jira Sync
listings.description: Sync GitHub issues/PRs with Jira tickets, auto-create tickets from commits, and generate sprint summaries. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Slack Notifier
listings.description: Send rich Slack notifications with Block Kit — alerts, reports, approvals, and interactive messages. From Block's Goose recipes.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Web Scraper
listings.description: Intelligent web scraper using Playwright + Claude to extract structured data from any website, handling dynamic content and pagination.
listings.author: Block (formerly Square)

listings.title: Cron Scheduler
listings.description: Schedule and manage recurring tasks with natural language — 'every Monday at 9am' becomes a cron expression, with APScheduler integration.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Data Visualizer
listings.description: Generate charts and dashboards from data using matplotlib, plotly, and pandas. Outputs PNG, HTML, or SVG visualizations.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Email Drafter
listings.description: Draft professional emails in any tone — cold outreach, follow-ups, escalations, announcements, and replies — with tone matching and subject line variants.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Log Analyzer
listings.description: Parse and analyze application logs — find errors, detect anomalies, build timelines, and summarize incidents from structured or unstructured log files.
listings.author: prowlr-community

listings.title: Meeting Summarizer
listings.description: Transcribe audio recordings and generate structured meeting summaries with action items, decisions, and follow-up assignments.
listings.author: prowlr-community
